data.title: Story Protocol and OpenLedger introduce new standard for AI training and creator payments amid legal scrutiny and increasing demand for transparency in AI models. announced on Jan. 29, 2026.
data.description: A new joint standard has been introduced by Story Protocol and OpenLedger in response to increasing legal scrutiny and regulatory pressure on AI training data. This standard aims to provide transparency into the construction of artificial intelligence models. The announcement was made on January 29, 2026, in San Francisco. This development comes amidst growing concerns over the use of AI, with a focus on ensuring accountability and understanding in the creation of these models.

data.title: Bybit plans to introduce retail bank accounts with personal IBANs, offering instant fiat access and crypto trading, starting February.
data.description: Bybit, a cryptocurrency exchange, has announced the launch of "My Bank" accounts that offer users personal IBANs, immediate access to fiat currencies, the flexibility of multi-currency transfers, and the ability to conduct cryptocurrency trading under their own name. This new feature aims to provide enhanced convenience and efficiency to users, allowing them to seamlessly navigate between traditional and digital assets. With "My Bank" accounts, users can enjoy a comprehensive financial ecosystem on Bybit, streamlining their trading experience.

data.title: Aker Security collaborates with Cyviz to create control rooms for real-time data analysis; services cover thousands of employees.
data.description: In Norway, Aker Security manages security for a significant portion of their Group, which includes thousands of employees. Their services encompass travel security, global event monitoring, crisis management, and security advisory services. A key issue faced in the current security environment is effectively handling vast amounts of data in time-sensitive and coordinated scenarios. Due to this challenge, they sought assistance from Cyviz to aggregate, visualize, and utilize data efficiently.

data.description: In Europe, businesses are adopting managed services integrating AI-assisted and AI-driven features to transform their network strategies, according to ISG. This shift indicates a significant change in how companies are managing their networks.

data.title: Natural catastrophe losses reached over $100 billion in 2025, lower by $40 billion from 2024, warning against a false sense of security.
data.description: In London on January 29, 2026, it was reported that in 2025, natural catastrophes led to over US$100 billion in insured losses, marking the sixth year in a row surpassing this amount. This total saw a decrease of $40 billion compared to the previous year. Notably, these losses were incurred even without any hurricanes striking the United States. This data underscores the ongoing severity and durability of natural catastrophe risk.

data.title: Faculty named as a visionary in 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Decision Intelligence Platforms, integrating with technology to drive business value.
data.description: A prominent European company, Faculty, has introduced Faculty Frontier™, a platform that aids enterprises in implementing Decision Intelligence effectively. This innovative platform seamlessly integrates with current technologies and data sources to provide comprehensive insights and recommendations that contribute to business success. The launch of Faculty Frontier™ occurred in London on January 29, 2026, showcasing its potential to drive business value through connected insights and recommendations.

data.title: ezW2 2025 is now out, offering a built-in W-2 and 1099 E-File service for the 2026 tax season. Electronic filing made easy for the Feb 2, 2026 deadline.
data.description: Act quickly to avoid IRS penalties as the February 2, 2026 deadline for filing W-2 and W-3 forms approaches. Time is of the essence, act now to meet the looming February 2nd deadline.

data.title: Last call to file 1099 forms with ez1099's efile service for easy submission. Deadline days away, stress-free process.
data.description: As the deadlines for 1099 forms loom near, ez1099 efile service based in Redmond, Washington, offers a swift and simplified method to efile these forms without the need for a TCC. This service, launched on January 29, 2026, aims to help individuals and businesses meet the looming deadlines efficiently. With increasing deadline pressure, ez1099 provides a faster and easier solution, potentially saving time and effort for users.

data.title: Sumsub introduces AI Agent Verification linking AI agents to human identity for trust & fraud prevention. London, Jan. 29, 2026.
data.description: Sumsub, a prominent leader in global verification and fraud prevention, has introduced a groundbreaking verification framework that establishes a connection between AI agents and confirmed human identity, reshaping digital trust and AI fraud deterrence. The company made the announcement in London on January 29, 2026. This innovative AI Agent aims to enhance security measures by providing a reliable link to authentic human identities.
